# S7 [Designer] — Audio assets

**Placeholder:** `.wav` files (0.1s silence) generated by `npm run generate-audio`.

**Production:** Replace with royalty-free assets (OpenGameArt, Freesound, Pixabay):

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| music.mp3, music.ogg | Energetic loop, 60–120 sec |
| sfx/jump | Whoosh |
| sfx/coin | Ding |
| sfx/multiplier | Power-up |
| sfx/crash | Impact |
| sfx/ui_click | Soft tap |

Format: .mp3 + .ogg for each. Howler tries formats in order.
